members.name: AcceptStream
members.signature: public int AcceptStream(StreamPeer stream, TLSOptions serverOptions)
members.summary: Accepts a peer connection as a server using the given [param server_options]. See [method TLSOptions.server].

members.name: ConnectToStream
members.signature: public int ConnectToStream(StreamPeer stream, String commonName, TLSOptions clientOptions)
members.summary: Connects to a peer using an underlying [StreamPeer] [param stream] and verifying the remote certificate is correctly signed for the given [param common_name]. You can pass the optional [param client_options] parameter to customize the trusted certification authorities, or disable the common name verification. See [method TLSOptions.client] and [method TLSOptions.client_unsafe].

members.name: GetStatus
members.summary: Returns the status of the connection.

members.name: GetStream
members.summary: Returns the underlying [StreamPeer] connection, used in [method accept_stream] or [method connect_to_stream].

members.name: Poll
members.summary: Poll the connection to check for incoming bytes. Call this right before [method StreamPeer.get_available_bytes] for it to work properly.

values.name: STATUS_CONNECTED
values.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] that is connected to a host.

values.name: STATUS_DISCONNECTED
values.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] that is disconnected.

values.name: STATUS_ERROR
values.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] in error state.

values.name: STATUS_ERROR_HOSTNAME_MISMATCH
values.summary: An error status that shows a mismatch in the TLS certificate domain presented by the host and the domain requested for validation.

values.name: STATUS_HANDSHAKING
values.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] during handshaking.

constants.name: STATUS_DISCONNECTED
constants.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] that is disconnected.

constants.name: STATUS_HANDSHAKING
constants.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] during handshaking.

constants.name: STATUS_CONNECTED
constants.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] that is connected to a host.

constants.name: STATUS_ERROR
constants.summary: A status representing a [StreamPeerTLS] in error state.

constants.name: STATUS_ERROR_HOSTNAME_MISMATCH
constants.summary: An error status that shows a mismatch in the TLS certificate domain presented by the host and the domain requested for validation.
